scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter @cc-pet/server exec vitest run tests/e2e-connect-regression.test.ts tests/workspace-api.test.ts && pnpm --filter @cc-pet/web exec sh -c 'if node -e "process.exit(process.versions.node.split(\".\")[0]>=25?0:1)"; then export NODE_OPTIONS="${NODE_OPTIONS:-} --no-experimental-webstorage"; fi; vitest run src/App.integration.test.tsx'
